goal: Conduct a strict forensic audit of v10 microstructure overlay results to confirm or reject their validity before any further research.
global_constraints: Immutable reference: active-signal-v1@1 only; never modify baseline parameters, thresholds, features, or execution logic.
No new features, new directional scouts, early-cuts, or label changes are permitted in v11.
All comparisons must use identical train / selection-OOS / lockbox windows (same-window truth only).
Lockbox must never be used to choose thresholds, labels, or model hyper-parameters.
Short-only, long-only, and combined veto must be tested in separate runs; identical deltas across all three must be explained, not accepted.
Rule-based overlay must be tested before model-backed overlay.
PROMOTE status is only valid if v10 survives the entire forensic cycle.

slices.title: Snapshot assembly audit
slices.hypothesis: Verify that veto overlay snapshot logic respects causal order and does not retroactively block trades with future knowledge.
slices.objective: Verify that veto overlay snapshot logic respects causal order and does not retroactively block trades with future knowledge.
success_criteria: Causal verdict per snapshot variant: decision timing, causal blocking, side isolation, and mixed-logic absence all confirmed or flagged.
evidence_requirements: Causal verdict per snapshot variant: decision timing, causal blocking, side isolation, and mixed-logic absence all confirmed or flagged.

slices.title: Same-window matched reruns
slices.hypothesis: Run base and all overlay variants on the identical lockbox window to produce a trustworthy matched comparison.
slices.objective: Run base and all overlay variants on the identical lockbox window to produce a trustworthy matched comparison.
success_criteria: Matched same-window comparison table is complete with all four routes on identical boundaries.
evidence_requirements: Matched same-window comparison table is complete with all four routes on identical boundaries.

slices.title: Cannibalization and ownership audit
slices.hypothesis: Prove that overlay improvement is driven by genuine removal of bad trades, not by hidden interaction or coverage loss.
slices.objective: Prove that overlay improvement is driven by genuine removal of bad trades, not by hidden interaction or coverage loss.
success_criteria: Honest ownership/cannibalization verdict per route with quantified loser/winner removal shares.
evidence_requirements: Honest ownership/cannibalization verdict per route with quantified loser/winner removal shares.
